  • Class
    Description
    EventBAttributes
    This class lists all attribute names used by the Event-B core plugin.
    EventBPlugin
    The Event-B core plugin class.
    IAccuracyElement
    An accuracy element contains a grade of accuracy: it is accurate or not.
    IAction
    Common protocol for Event-B actions.
    IAssignmentElement
    Common protocol for Event-B elements that contain an assignment.
    IAxiom
    Common protocol for Event-B axioms.
    ICarrierSet
    Common protocol for Event-B carrier sets.
    ICommentedElement
    Common protocol for elements that carry a comment.
    IConfigurationElement
    The contents of Event-B models is interpreted with respect to configurations: a configuration describes a certain composition of modules of the static checker and the proof obligation generator.
    IConstant
    Common protocol for Event-B constants.
    IContextRoot
    Common protocol for Event-B (unchecked) contexts.
    IConvergenceElement
    Common protocol for Event-B convergence properties of an event.
    IConvergenceElement.Convergence
    The enumerated type Convergence specifies the different convergence types of events.
    IDerivedPredicateElement
    Common protocol for predicate elements that can be theorems.
    IEvent
    Common protocol for Event-B events.
    IEventBProject
    Common protocol for Event-B projects.
    IEventBRoot
    Common protocol for Event-B files.
    IExpressionElement
    Common protocol for Event-B elements that contain an expression.
    IExtendsContext
    Common protocol for an extends clauses of a context.
    IGeneratedElement
    Common protocol for predicate elements that can be generated.
    IGuard
    Common protocol for Event-B guards.
    IIdentifierElement
    Common protocol for elements that contain an Event-B identifier (carrier set, constant or variable).
    IInvariant
    Common protocol for Event-B invariants.
    ILabeledElement
    Common protocol for elements that carry a label.
    ILanguage
    Common protocol for representing a variant of the Event-B mathematical language.
    IMachineRoot
    Common protocol for Event-B (unchecked) machines.
    IParameter
    Common protocol for Event-B event parameters.
    IPOHint
    A hint for a proof of a proof obligation.
    IPOIdentifier
    Common protocol for typed identifiers in Event-B Proof Obligation (PO) files.
    IPOPredicate
    Common protocol for predicates in Event-B Proof Obligation (PO) files.
    IPOPredicateSet
    Common protocol for predicate sets in Event-B Proof Obligation (PO) files.
    IPORoot
    Common protocol for Event-B Proof Obligation (PO) files.
    IPOSelectionHint
    A selection hint points a prover at hypotheses that are most likely useful in proving a particular proof obligation.
    IPOSequent
    Common protocol for proof obligations in Event-B Proof Obligation (PO) files.
    IPOSource
    Specifies a source element of a proof obligation.
    IPOStampedElement
    Proof obligation stamps signal changes in PO sequents (i.e.
    IPredicateElement
    Common protocol for Event-B elements that contain a predicate.
    IPRExprRef
    Common protocol for references to expressions.
    IPRHypAction
    Common protocol for hypothesis management action in a persisted proof.
    IPRIdentifier
    Common protocol for typed identifiers in Event-B Proof (PR) files.
    IProofStoreCollector
    Collects formulae for the proof store
    IProofStoreReader
     
    IPRPredRef
    Common protocol for references to expressions.
    IPRProof
    Common protocol for Event-B Proof elements stored in the RODIN Database.
    IPRProofInfoElement
    This interface contains getter and setter methods for internal elements that record and cache proof information.
    IPRProofRule
    Common protocol for proof rules.
    IPRReasoner
    Common protocol for reasoners used in a proof.
    IPRRoot
    Common protocol for Event-B Proof (PR) files.
    IPRRuleAntecedent
    Common protocol for proof rule antecedents.
    IPRStoredExpr
    Common protocol for proof expressions.
    IPRStoredPred
    Common protocol for proof predicates.
    IPRStringInput
    Common protocol for string input.
    IPSRoot
    Common protocol for Event-B Proof Status (PS) files.
    IPSStatus
    Common protocol for Proof Status elements in Event-B Proof Status (PS) files.
    IRefinesEvent
    Common protocol for a refines clause in an event.
    IRefinesMachine
    Common protocol for a refines clause in a machine.
    ISCAction
    Common protocol for Event-B checked actions.
    ISCAssignmentElement
    Common protocol for Event-B SC elements that contain an assignment.
    ISCAxiom
    Common protocol for Event-B SC axioms.
    ISCCarrierSet
    Common protocol for carrier sets in Event-B statically checked (SC) contexts.
    ISCConstant
    Common protocol for constants in Event-B statically checked (SC) contexts.
    ISCContext
    Common protocol for Event-B statically checked (SC) context files.
    ISCContextRoot
    Common protocol for Event-B statically checked (SC) context files.
    ISCEvent
    Common protocol for events in Event-B statically checked (SC) files.
    ISCExpressionElement
    Common protocol for Event-B SC elements that contain an expression.
    ISCExtendsContext
    Common protocol for an extends clause of a statically checked context.
    ISCGuard
    Common protocol for Event-B SC guards.
    ISCIdentifierElement
    Common protocol for Event-B statically checked identifiers.
    ISCInternalContext
    Common protocol for internal contexts in Event-B statically checked (SC) files.
    ISCInvariant
    Common protocol for Event-B SC invariants.
    ISCMachineRoot
    Common protocol for Event-B statically checked (SC) machine files.
    ISCParameter
    Common protocol for event parameters in Event-B statically checked (SC) machines.
    ISCPredicateElement
    Common protocol for Event-B SC elements that contain a predicate.
    ISCRefinesEvent
    Common protocol for a refines clause of an event.
    ISCRefinesMachine
    Common protocol for a refines clause of a statically checked machine.
    ISCSeesContext
    Common protocol for a sees clause of a statically checked machine.
    ISCVariable
    Common protocol for variables in Event-B statically checked (SC) machines.
    ISCVariant
    Common protocol for Event-B SC variants.
    ISCWitness
    Common protocol for Event-B SC witnesses.
    ISeesContext
    Common protocol for a sees clause in a machine.
    ITraceableElement
    Common interface for all traceable elements.
    IVariable
    Common protocol for Event-B machine variables.
    IVariant
    Common protocol for Event-B variants.
    IWitness
    Common protocol for Event-B witnesses.
